summary: Iteration 33: Tested login flow improvements and admin paid users management. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page shows 'Diocreations Login' title (verified via data-testid='login-heading')
Forgot Password link is visible on login page (data-testid='forgot-password-link')
Forgot Password form works - shows 'Reset Your Password' form with email input
Forgot Password submission shows success message 'Check Your Email'
Reset Password page shows 'Invalid Reset Link' error when no token provided
Reset Password page shows form with password fields when token is provided
POST /api/user/forgot-password endpoint works (returns 200 with success message)
Admin can view list of paid users at GET /api/admin/resume/paid-users
Admin can grant access via POST /api/admin/resume/grant-access (validates resume_id)
Admin can revoke access via DELETE /api/admin/resume/revoke-access/{resume_id}
Admin Resume page has 'Paid Users' tab visible with 3 tabs: Uploaded Resumes, Paid Users, Pricing Settings
LinkedIn Optimizer Access toggle is visible in admin Paid Users tab
Grant Paid Access form is visible with Resume ID and User Email fields
Paid Users List shows users with email, filename, paid date, score, and Revoke button
critical_code_review_comments: UserLoginPage.jsx: Correctly shows 'Diocreations Login' title (line 216) with data-testid='login-heading'
UserLoginPage.jsx: Forgot password link properly implemented with data-testid='forgot-password-link' (line 269)
UserLoginPage.jsx: Forgot password form has proper validation and shows success state (lines 124-205)
ResetPasswordPage.jsx: Properly handles missing token case with error display (lines 94-106)
ResetPasswordPage.jsx: Form has proper data-testid attributes for testing (lines 137, 160, 175)
public_auth.py: forgot-password endpoint properly prevents email enumeration (lines 218-224)
public_auth.py: reset-password endpoint validates token expiration and marks as used (lines 258-296)
resume.py: Admin paid-users endpoint returns enriched data with resume info (lines 271-297)
resume.py: Grant access creates manual payment record with audit trail (lines 300-334)
resume.py: Revoke access properly deletes payment record (lines 337-346)
AdminResume.jsx: Paid Users tab properly implemented with grant/revoke functionality (lines 295-445)
AdminResume.jsx: LinkedIn Optimizer Access toggle properly bound to pricing state (lines 422-445)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified all login flow improvements and admin paid users management: 1) Login page shows 'Diocreations Login' branding (not 'Emergent Login' or 'Your Account'), 2) Forgot Password flow works with email input and success message, 3) Reset Password page handles both missing token (error) and valid token (form) cases, 4) Admin Resume page has 'Paid Users' tab with grant/revoke access functionality, 5) LinkedIn Optimizer Access toggle is visible in admin. All backend APIs tested: forgot-password, reset-password, paid-users, grant-access, revoke-access. Resume upload similarity-based deduplication is implemented in resume.py (lines 366-464) with 70% similarity threshold for same resume detection and 30% threshold for blocking different resumes.
